description: DashDesign complete-poster Image2 prompt template library for to-C AI education poster generation.

purposes.name: 课程招生海报
purposes.goal: Convert parents and students into course inquiries or registrations.
positive_blocks: to-C children and parent-facing AI digital creation course enrollment poster
make course value clear at a glance: future skills, creative expression, visible works, and confidence
show children learning and creating in a polished future classroom or digital art studio
the poster must feel like a real education marketing asset, not a software UI mockup
cta_guidance: make the call-to-action prominent and easy to find
leave a clean QR placeholder area near the CTA

purposes.name: 免费试听/体验课
purposes.goal: Encourage parents to book a low-friction trial class.
positive_blocks: friendly children AI art workshop poster for parents and students
emphasize approachable first experience, curiosity, creative confidence, and visible take-home work
make the mood warm, bright, safe, and inspiring
avoid pressure-heavy sales visuals; use a welcoming activity poster tone
cta_guidance: make the trial or audition offer feel clear and immediate
leave a clean QR placeholder area for booking

purposes.name: AI能力测评预约
purposes.goal: Prompt parents to scan and book a free AI ability assessment.
positive_blocks: premium AI ability assessment booking poster for children and parents
emphasize discovering each child's creative potential and AI learning readiness
show assessment as professional, trustworthy, and fun rather than exam-like
use a clear promotional poster hierarchy with a strong CTA
cta_guidance: make the free assessment offer visually prominent
reserve a clean QR placeholder for appointment booking

purposes.name: 课程体系介绍
purposes.goal: Explain the course system and four capability modules in one poster.
positive_blocks: structured AI digital creation course system poster for parents
show four course pillars as integrated creative outcomes, not dense bullet lists
make the course path feel systematic, future-facing, and suitable for children
balance professional education credibility with child-friendly visual appeal
cta_guidance: keep the CTA secondary to the course system overview
reserve a clean QR placeholder area for more details

styles.name: 科技霓虹
positive_blocks: high-impact blue-purple neon technology poster
cinematic future classroom lighting, glowing screens, holographic creative interfaces
rich contrast, electric cyan and magenta accents, premium commercial poster finish
suitable for AI course enrollment with strong visual energy
typography_blocks: main headline uses large custom Chinese 3D lettering with metallic strokes, cyan edge light, and controlled neon glow
headline should have real advertising title design, not plain system font
module labels use futuristic glowing badges or integrated display panels
CTA uses a bold promotional neon ribbon or illuminated banner

styles.name: 明亮少儿教育
positive_blocks: bright premium children education poster
warm daylight, clean future classroom, colorful but trustworthy parent-facing palette
happy children creating visible AI artworks, friendly robots or creative tools as supporting elements
clear, optimistic, safe, and inspiring education brand tone
typography_blocks: main headline uses bold friendly Chinese poster lettering with soft dimensional outline
use high readability and bright color contrast, avoid overly dark or aggressive title effects
module labels look like polished education badges, stickers, or rounded display labels
CTA uses a bright enrollment banner that parents can read quickly

styles.name: 梦幻AI绘图
positive_blocks: fantasy digital art poster for children AI drawing
show imagination becoming visible artwork: dragons, stars, cute characters, magical landscapes, and glowing tablets
colorful dreamlike lighting with polished commercial illustration quality
make creative results feel exciting and attainable for children
typography_blocks: main headline uses magical gradient Chinese lettering with luminous outline and subtle sparkle
do not use plain UI text; make title feel like a fantasy workshop poster
module labels may look like magic cards, creative stickers, or illustrated badges
CTA uses a vivid but readable fantasy banner

styles.name: 高端简洁
positive_blocks: premium clean AI education brand poster
restrained composition, generous visual breathing room, modern future classroom or digital studio
high-end parent-facing education brand quality, not noisy promotion
use refined color accents and clear visual hierarchy
typography_blocks: main headline uses elegant bold Chinese display lettering with subtle dimensional highlight
prioritize readability, balance, and brand credibility over extreme effects
module labels use clean premium information blocks or tasteful badges
CTA uses a simple but prominent enrollment strip

styles.name: 漫画热血
positive_blocks: energetic comic-style children creative course poster
dynamic lines, action panels, manga storyboard elements, bold stickers, and playful visual momentum
show kids making comics, characters, videos, and digital stories with AI
exciting but still parent-appropriate and polished
typography_blocks: main headline uses large comic poster Chinese lettering with thick outline, impact shadow, and pop highlights
module labels look like manga stickers, action captions, or comic badges
CTA uses a punchy promotional sticker or banner
keep all Chinese text legible despite dynamic effects

layouts.name: 顶部大标题 + 中部模块 + 底部CTA
positive_blocks: composition: large headline in the upper area, strong subject image in the center, course modules grouped in the middle or side, CTA and QR placeholder at the bottom
preserve clear hierarchy from headline to subtitle to modules to CTA
avoid scattering required copy across the whole image

layouts.name: 中心主体 + 环绕模块
positive_blocks: composition: child or creative work as central visual subject, course modules arranged around the subject as badges or panels
headline remains large and readable, module labels support the central subject without covering the face or hands
CTA and QR placeholder stay in a clean lower area

layouts.name: 竖版展架信息流
positive_blocks: composition: portrait poster or standee layout with title at top, child/creative scene in the middle, course highlights in stacked readable sections, CTA near the bottom
leave enough vertical spacing so Chinese text does not become tiny
suitable for 80x120 or other vertical printed posters

layouts.name: 方版社媒主视觉
positive_blocks: composition: square social poster with fewer larger text zones and a strong central visual hook
avoid dense module paragraphs; use compact badges and short labels
CTA and QR placeholder should not crowd the course module text

text_density.name: 低文字
positive_blocks: low text density: use headline, short subtitle if provided, and one CTA only
keep text large and highly legible

text_density.name: 中文字
positive_blocks: medium text density: headline, subtitle, 3-4 module titles, and CTA are acceptable
module detail text must be short, readable, and grouped cleanly

text_density.name: 高文字
positive_blocks: high text density: simplify visual clutter and use structured sections so text stays readable
do not create many tiny labels; enlarge required text even if some decorative elements must be reduced
text_density.risk_note: Higher risk of Chinese text drift; generate more candidates and review carefully.

negative_templates.name: 完整海报负面约束
blocks: do not add any readable text beyond the required copy
do not rewrite, translate, abbreviate, duplicate, or omit the exact Chinese copy
do not create pseudo-Chinese, gibberish, malformed glyphs, or typo-like text
do not generate a scannable QR code; leave only a clean blank QR placeholder area
do not include phone numbers, prices, fake logos, watermarks, signatures, or brand marks
do not show business partnership, franchise, school-operation, sales meeting, or to-B cooperation scenes
do not make children, hands, screens, or faces distorted

negative_templates.name: 无文字背景负面约束
blocks: do not render any readable text, pseudo-text, QR code, logo, price, phone number, watermark, or signature
use blank panels or abstract marks only where future text may be placed
avoid business partnership, franchise, school-operation, or to-B cooperation scenes
